column1: # review-harness-manifest.tsv — planted mutants in harness-plan-alpha.md and their detection signatures.
# Columns (TAB): id  kind  class  regexA  regexB  note
# detect: DETECTED when one finding line matches regexA AND regexB (case-insensitive ERE).
# precision: every finding line matching regexA AND regexB counts as a FALSE POSITIVE.
# Scored lines are "severity | file | title | description" per finding. Anchor drift guards in score-review-selftest.sh.
